summary: Guardian Mode (Phase 36) testing complete. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: tabs (Monitor/Guardians/History), guardian CRUD form, session lifecycle (start/stop), location updates, map with live tracking, status panel, active sessions operator table, session history.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React hydration warning from dynamic rendering in table body. Does not affect functionality but should be fixed for cleaner console output.

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/guardian/add creates guardian with name, phone, email, relationship - VERIFIED, persists to PostgreSQL
GET /api/guardian/list returns all active guardians for current user - VERIFIED
POST /api/guardian/start creates persistent session with initial zone check, returns guardians_notified count - VERIFIED
POST /api/guardian/stop?session_id=xxx ends session with summary (duration, alerts, final_zone) - VERIFIED
GET /api/guardian/session/{id} returns full session state with alerts - VERIFIED
GET /api/guardian/sessions/active returns all active sessions (operator-only, 403 for non-operators) - VERIFIED
GET /api/guardian/sessions/history returns user's past sessions - VERIFIED
POST /api/guardian/update-location processes movement, updates zone risk - VERIFIED
Zone escalation persists to guardian_alerts table - VERIFIED via update_location tests
Session data persists to PostgreSQL (guardian_sessions table) - VERIFIED via history tests

Frontend data-testids all present: guardian-mode-dashboard, gm-start, gm-stop, gm-step, gm-add-guardian-btn, gm-save-guardian, gm-guardian-list, gm-status-panel, gm-map, gm-alerts, gm-stats, gm-active-sessions, gm-history, gm-tab-monitor, gm-tab-guardians, gm-tab-history
Authentication required for all endpoints (401/403 without token) - VERIFIED
Operator role required for /sessions/active endpoint (403 for guardian role) - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Existing guardian 'Mother' was already present. Multiple test sessions created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian Mode fully functional. API endpoints at /api/guardian/*. Frontend dashboard at /operator/guardian-mode. Test coordinates: start=(12.971, 77.594), dest=(12.935, 77.624), HIGH zone=(12.972, 77.587). Stop endpoint uses query param: POST /guardian/stop?session_id=xxx. Acknowledge-safety also uses query param. PostgreSQL tables: guardians, guardian_sessions, guardian_alerts. There is 1 pre-existing guardian named 'Mother'. Sessions are persisted to DB not in-memory.

mocked_apis.notifications: Push/SMS notifications not actually dispatched to guardians - MOCKED
mocked_apis.osrm: OSRM uses public server for route calculations

backend_api_tests: Authentication required for all endpoints (list, add, start, active sessions)
Add guardian with full data (name, phone, email, relationship)
Add guardian with minimal data (name only)
Start session with destination for ETA tracking
Get session returns full state with alerts
Get session with invalid id returns 404
Stop session with invalid id returns 404
Update location with invalid session returns 404
Guardian persists after creation (found in list)
Session appears in history after end
Full flow test: add guardian -> start -> updates -> stop -> verify history
frontend_ui_tests: Stats panel shows Guardians count, Active Sessions, Critical, Total Sessions
Tabs present: Monitor (Live Monitor), Guardians (My Guardians), History
Monitor tab: Session controls with coordinate inputs (start lat/lng, dest lat/lng)
Monitor tab: Start button ('Share My Safety'), Stop button
Monitor tab: Map renders with CartoDB tiles, shows Bengaluru area
Guardians tab: Shows existing guardian 'Mother' with remove button
Guardians tab: Add Guardian form (name, phone, email, relationship, Save button)
History tab: Session history table with columns (Started, Status, Duration, Risk, Distance, Escalation)
Active session shows: Live status panel (risk level, score, zone, speed, duration, distance)
Active session shows: Simulate Movement step button
Active sessions table (operator view) shows all live sessions
Session flow: Start -> Status panel appears -> Step to simulate -> Stop -> Session ends
Toast notifications work (Guardian Mode active, X guardians notified)

verified_features: Guardian CRUD: add/list/remove guardians (persisted to PostgreSQL)
Location updates with zone checking and risk escalation
Frontend guardian form: name, phone, email, relationship selector
Frontend session controls: Start/Stop buttons, coordinate inputs
Frontend live status panel: risk level, score, zone, speed, duration, distance
Frontend map: Leaflet with CartoDB dark tiles, user marker, destination marker
Frontend active sessions table: shows all live sessions for operators
